summary: Schema/backend rename checks, targeted validators, and zero stale-reference grep passed, but `bunx convex dev --once` failed on Convex typecheck errors in test files, so VAL-RENAME-008 did not pass.

assertions.details: Schema inspection showed the renamed `personaConfigs` table and related `configTranscripts` / `batchGenerationRuns` tables use `configId` / `personaConfigId` references consistently.
evidence: convex/schema.ts defines `personaConfigs` at line 159 and `configTranscripts` at line 224.
`configId: v.id("personaConfigs")` appears in config transcript, synthetic user, batch generation, and transcript extraction related tables.

assertions.details: The renamed Convex API surface is present under `personaConfigs`, including draft creation, updates, publish/archive, and transcript-derived user application.
evidence: Targeted tests `convex/personaConfigs.test.ts`, `convex/crossAreaIntegration.test.ts`, `convex/batchGeneration.test.ts`, and `apps/web/src/router.test.tsx` all passed (105 tests total).

assertions.details: Relevant targeted validators passed for the rename and generation-ui milestone, and the latest scrutiny synthesis for generation-ui also recorded passing validators.
evidence: `bun run test -- ...batchGeneration.test.ts ...personaConfigs.test.ts ...crossAreaIntegration.test.ts ...router.test.tsx` exited 0 with 105/105 tests passing.
`bun run typecheck` exited 0 across all workspaces.

assertions.details: `bunx convex dev --once` did not validate cleanly because Convex typecheck failed before schema validation completed.
evidence: Convex reported `convex/batchGeneration.test.ts:741 TS2304 Cannot find name "Doc"` and `convex/crossAreaIntegration.test.ts:182 TS7006 Parameter "syntheticUser" implicitly has an "any" type`.

assertions.details: Related renamed references are consistent for transcript attachments and persona configuration foreign keys.
evidence: `convex/schema.ts` uses `personaConfigId` fields in downstream tables and `configId` for config-scoped records.

assertions.details: Axis library auto-population remained intact after the rename according to both targeted tests and later user-surface evidence.
evidence: Manual user testing later showed publishing the generated-user runtime config produced a new `time_pressure` axis library entry with usage count 1 and creation source `Persona configuration publish`.

assertions.details: No stale TypeScript rename references remained outside generated files and migrations.
evidence: `rg "personaPack|PersonaPack|persona-pack|persona_pack|packTranscript|PackTranscript" -g "*.ts" -g "*.tsx" --glob "!convex/_generated/**" --glob "!**/migrations/**" ...` exited 1 with no matches, which is ripgrep's zero-match success condition.

commands.observation: All four workspace typecheck steps exited 0.

commands.command: bun run test -- convex/batchGeneration.test.ts convex/personaConfigs.test.ts convex/crossAreaIntegration.test.ts apps/web/src/router.test.tsx
commands.observation: Vitest ran 4 files and 105 tests; all passed.
ripgrep returned no matches, which is the expected zero-stale-reference result.
Convex preparation failed at TypeScript typecheck with TS2304 in `convex/batchGeneration.test.ts` and TS7006 in `convex/crossAreaIntegration.test.ts`.

blockers: VAL-RENAME-008 failed because `bunx convex dev --once` did not complete successfully.
